red_flags: Unsolicited job offer via unknown contact recruiting for commission-based role
Payment promised exclusively in USDT (crypto) — avoids banking oversight
Vague job description requiring no skills ('just operate a mobile phone')
Referral code used for recruitment — classic pyramid/task scam onboarding
Salary structure mimics pig-butchering task scam ($500 / $1500 / $2000 tiers)
Company ACCIO.com is not a verifiable established employer
